# thingsvis Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-01-21

- TypeScript 5.6+, Node.js 20 LTS + Prisma 5.22+, @prisma/client 5.22+ (013-prisma-schema)

frontend/
tests/

## Code Style
